creator: me@svmhdvn.name
text:
Created attachment 252298
[PATCH] lang/perl5*: fix 'pkg -r' installation

The @postexec commands in lang/perl5* pkg-plist files do not account for 'pkg -r' installations as they don't add DESTDIR (exposed as PKG_ROOTDIR to post-install scripts) to the PREFIX. The attached patch fixes that for all perl ports.
